figure: Minimum suggested crew size: one laborer and one equipment operator.

Notes:
1. Times for anchor holes include backfill, tamping, and securing tail of guy line.
2. Times for machine digging include setting up machine.
3. When using power-installed screw anchor machines, use 0.5 multiplier.
4. Pole hole depth is determined by: length of pole in feet, divided by 10; plus 1 foot for rock or 2 feet for dirt.
